string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: NEW: Deep Scan unifies 12 cleaning phases into a single animated flow
Hidden caches, CorpseFinder, app deep-clean & large duplicates now run from the main Cleaner button
Empty folders & log/crash files are now detected automatically
Trash & clipboard included in every Deep scan
Opt-in: blurry & visually similar photos (off by default — adds ~2 min)
Full launchpad report: tap any row to jump straight to its dedicated cleanup screen
Cancel scan with one tap — partial results are kept
Still honest: scan is always free, no fake numbers, no auto-delete on advanced phases
